title: Nerbvival
description: A lightweight Create-focused modpack with the intention of updating through future Minecraft versions whilst maintaining compatibility.
body:
![Spinning cogwheel page separator.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A0iuxBgD/images/76c64e8297eb684e8178fca6d7c7e09adc992a06.gif) ![A Minecraft logo with a 'Nerbvival' subtitle beneath it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A0iuxBgD/images/a07557c7ac0c5513ce9fa428cce741e0f9a7642b.png)

About the modpack:

Nerbvival is a lightweight modpack designed to be updated to the most current version of Minecraft, should the core content mods be updated as well. As time goes on, mods will be added and removed but will never reach the point of being a full experience changing modpack. The intention is to keep the mod list as trimmed down as possible, avoiding duplicate mods and mods that change the core vanilla Minecraft gameplay too heavily. It's best to think of it as "vanilla, with a few extra mods."

![Spinning cogwheel page separator.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A0iuxBgD/images/76c64e8297eb684e8178fca6d7c7e09adc992a06.gif)

FAQ:

Q: Will you add [mod]?
A: No, not by request, the modpack should be light enough for any mod to be added on your own and not have things break.

Q: When will the modpack be updated to 1.21+?
A: It will be updated when all of the core mods (mods that need to be present or else existing saves will break) update and verified as working. The first updated version will be marked as Alpha/Beta.

Q: Help! I need assistance with something! I'm crashing/bugged/ect.
A: Not a question, check how much memory you're allocating to the pack (should be around ~3-4GB), but if you need help, then you can contact me on Discord at: @novarleeir

![Spinning cogwheel page separator.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A0iuxBgD/images/76c64e8297eb684e8178fca6d7c7e09adc992a06.gif)

Roadmap:

Create Aeronautics + Elytra + Aether: Aeronautics will be an instant add into the modpack. Along with aeronautics, elytra rocket boosting will be disabled to encourage the use of flying machines (though obviously you can re-enable it). The Aether dimension will be added as it fits the whole flying and sky theme.

Create Diesel Generators: It's still up in the air on whether this mod will be kept with future version changes (1.20.2+) as it's possible that Aeronautics and Liftoff may add their own type of engine.

Nerbvival+ : For 1.21+, I will release a 'plus' version of the modpack that will include mods that will deviate from vanilla more.
